response.justification: Bogdan has 15+ years of broad engineering experience and genuine depth in high-throughput distributed systems (Dunnhumby, millions of req/s) and testing culture, but the resume reveals no meaningful exposure to the core competencies this role demands: there is no experimentation platform work, no feature-flagging or rollout-risk systems, no telemetry or metrics infrastructure, and no growth engineering background. The current title is Senior, not Principal, and there is no evidence of the cross-team platform ownership or stakeholder-alignment leadership expected at IC6. The breadth of languages and stacks is a mild positive, but it does not compensate for the absence of the domain-specific experience that is central to this hire.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience spanning C/C++, TypeScript, Java, and more, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Proven work on high-throughput distributed systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating production-scale reliability instincts
Deep testing and quality culture evidenced by open-source TDD libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), workshops, and consistent application of TDD/CI/CD practices across roles
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere on the resume — the primary technical requirement of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or data analysis work demonstrated; growth measurement and statistical experimentation quality are absent from the entire career history

Seniority gap: current and historical titles are Senior/Staff individual contributor with no evidence of Principal-level cross-team platform ownership, architectural influence at IC6 scope, or driving multi-workstream initiatives

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth metrics background
